validation_command: python -c "import importlib.util,sys;sys.path.insert(0,'.');spec=importlib.util.spec_from_file_location('hb_cli','scripts/run/hb_cli.py');m=importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec);spec.loader.exec_module(m);h1=m.compute_behavior_hash(0,'1 passed in 0.01s','');h2=m.compute_behavior_hash(0,'1 passed in 0.99s','');assert h1==h2,'FAIL: timing not normalized: '+h1+' != '+h2;h3=m.compute_behavior_hash(1,'1 passed in 0.01s','');assert h1!=h3,'FAIL: exit_code diff lost';print('OK: timing-agnostic + exit_code still discriminates')"
